name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We optimize routes instead of manual route planning using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient routing leads to delayed deliveries and increased fuel costs.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient routing leads to delayed deliveries and increased fuel costs.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We optimize routes instead of manual route planning using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We optimize routes instead of manual route planning using spreadsheets.
